description: FRONTIER: one retry loop halts the batch on failure to preserve ordering; siblings continue past failures. v0.1 detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: Ordering / idempotency regressions from unifying order-sensitive and order-independent retry loops

findings.rationale: retryLedger shares the shape of retryFetch and retryNotify but adds an early return that stops the whole batch when a job exhausts its retries. The early return is the ordering guarantee — without it a later entry can commit before an earlier one. A retry-asymmetry detector should flag the divergent control flow; v0.1 (sort-only) cannot.
